summary: Phase 3-4 testing complete. All features working correctly: PublicNavHeader on topics/experts pages, public topic landing page without login requirement, tile navigation to /topic/:id, 'Start my journey' redirects to login. Sticky CTA bar is functioning correctly at 600px threshold.

issues: Sticky CTA threshold (600px) is hardcoded while actual hero height is 1026px. This means CTA appears while user is still viewing hero section - may be intentional but could be adjusted if not desired.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ PublicNavHeader component properly integrated on /topics and /experts pages
✓ Navigation has Life Topics, Experts, Remedies links with correct data-testid attributes
✓ Topic tile click navigates to /topic/:topicId (NOT /login) - CORRECT
✓ PublicTopicLandingPage displays full content without requiring login
✓ Tier selector tabs (Focussed, Supported, Comprehensive) working correctly
✓ Tier summary card displays pricing (₹6,999 for Supported tier)
✓ 'Start my journey' button redirects unauthenticated users to /login - CORRECT
✓ Sticky CTA bar appears after scrolling past 600px threshold - WORKING
✓ Sticky CTA uses opacity/visibility CSS instead of transform (bug fix applied)
✓ Homepage nav has links to /topics, /experts, and remedies
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3-4 features fully tested and working. All public pages (topics, experts, topic landing) have proper navigation headers. Login is only required before checkout, not for browsing. Sticky CTA bar shows after 600px scroll.

homepage_navigation.remedies_link: PASS - /app/remedies or /login link present in nav
homepage_navigation.see_more_topics_btn: PASS - 'See More life topics' button found

sticky_cta_bar.fast_scroll: PASS - Works correctly, shows when threshold exceeded

public_topic_landing_page.login_redirect: PASS - Button redirects to /login for unauthenticated users
